summary: Digital Transformation Executive with 20+ years leading complex, multi-stakeholder digital delivery programmes across HealthTech, FinTech, and e-commerce in GCC and Egypt. Proven ability to translate strategy into actionable delivery roadmaps, build governance frameworks from the ground up, and drive measurable outcomes at scale. Currently leading $50M digital transformation across 15-hospital Saudi German Health network, deploying 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations. Built enterprise PMO managing 300+ concurrent projects across 8 countries at Network International. Expert in combining strategic consulting mindset with operational delivery excellence, embedding agile, lean, and hybrid models to build delivery cultures that scale. MBA candidate at Paris ESLSCA Business School.

items: AI and LLM Deployment (14 production agents)

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Leading end-to-end digital transformation delivery across 15-hospital network in KSA, UAE, and Egypt, managing $50M programme with direct accountability to executive leadership
Designed governance frameworks, delivery models, and standards to ensure predictable, quality outcomes across digital health, EMR, AI, and analytics initiatives
Deployed 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations, translating strategy into actionable roadmaps with measurable outcomes across clinical decision support and predictive analytics
Served as senior advisor to C-suite leadership and external technology partners (Health Catalyst, KLAS Research), driving alignment across project, technology, and leadership teams
Embedded agile and hybrid delivery practices across cross-functional teams of 30 professionals, building a delivery culture that prioritises quality, clarity, and continuous improvement
Championed data-informed decision-making across delivery teams, identifying risks early and designing mitigation strategies to protect programme integrity
Ensured JCI, HIMSS, and MOH regulatory compliance, embedding governance standards across all digital health initiatives

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led strategic delivery of Egypt's first comprehensive FinTech SuperApp, designing platform architecture and translating vision into structured roadmaps and delivery milestones
Served as senior advisor to leadership and external partners, facilitating executive decision-making and driving alignment across technology, product, and commercial teams
Built operational frameworks and governance models for phased market launch, structuring the unknown into clear, executable delivery plans

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Led digital transformation strategy and e-commerce platform delivery for one of Egypt's largest consumer electronics retailers
Designed delivery frameworks aligning IT investments with commercial outcomes, embedding data-informed decision-making across product and technology teams
Drove cross-functional stakeholder alignment across product, IT, legal, and commercial functions to deliver digital initiatives at scale

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led product delivery strategy during hypergrowth, contributing to platform scaling from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders across GCC markets (233x growth)
Designed delivery models and governance coordinating Berlin HQ, GCC countries, and Egypt markets, ensuring predictable outcomes during rapid scale
Led Operations Excellence Committee, driving continuous improvement and embedding delivery standards across cross-functional teams

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Built enterprise PMO from the ground up managing 300+ concurrent digital and technology delivery projects across 8 countries (Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Mauritius, South Africa)
Recruited, trained, and mentored team of 16 Project Managers, building delivery capability and driving continuous improvement across the portfolio
Established governance framework, delivery standards, and KPI model for portfolio performance reporting across 300+ banking clients worldwide
Governed 14-month Salesforce enterprise implementation across 8 countries (170 users), delivering on time with full stakeholder alignment

experience.title: Engagement Manager
bullets: Led consulting engagements for enterprise clients including Mayo Clinic (healthcare business process optimisation) and AT&T (service operations transformation)
Delivered strategic delivery frameworks and operational redesign recommendations, translating complex challenges into structured, actionable plans for senior leadership

experience.title: Earlier Experience (2004-2013)

bullets: Senior Project Manager, PMO at BlueCloud (2012-2013): IT infrastructure delivery for Microsoft Egypt, Vodafone Egypt, Qatar Diar
Project Manager at Intel Corporation (2011-2012): LTE (4G) mobile technology deployment
